Dear Indani, Bastian, Alfa, Mas Bela, Bu Leni, Fadila,

Pls list down all the menu/module access for daily operation as well as availability status in your user account, in order BLW and SUB able to check if their account also already has complete access for daily ops.
Thanks

example template asf:

no	 user name	 Role	 menu/module required for daily operation	 function	 availability status (Y/N)	 remark	 
1	 Indani	 CS	  	 Customer approval in vservice adm	 N	 pls add on/open access module for customer approval in vservice adm	 
 	  	  	  	  	  	  	 
2	 Malip	 Sales	 booking unlock etc	  	  N	  	 
3	 Leni	 Sales	  	  	  	  	 
 	  	  	  	  	  	  	 
3	 Ybastian	 Export Document	  	  	  	  	 
4	 Ybastian	 Inventory	  	 Update movement VD, ID, OC, VL	  Y	  	 
 	  	  	  	 Unlock
